overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-speed travel through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates from an outdoor highway through a neon-lit tunnel and into dense urban canyons with towering buildings and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with commercial billboards

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the rain-slicked elevated highway, passing illuminated advertisements on both sides

notable_agents.action: dark sedan traveling ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: metal safety barrier running along the left side of the elevated highway
large illuminated advertisement panel displaying product graphics
large illuminated advertisement panel with neon graphics
suspended lighting fixtures illuminating the highway from above

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a rain-soaked elevated highway at night, flanked by metal guardrails and illuminated billboards. The dashboard displays speeds around 100 km/h as the car passes other sparse traffic under artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed transit tunnel with bioluminescent ceiling panels

events.description: vehicle enters enclosed concrete tunnel from open highway, transitioning from rain-exposed to sheltered environment
ambient lighting shifts from warm sodium to cool blue neon as bioluminescent ceiling panels become visible

agents.ego_description: maintaining high velocity through the tunnel's blue-lit corridor, overtaking slower traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car ahead, moving slower in the center lane

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall of the tunnel interior passing closely on the left
smooth concrete wall of the tunnel interior on the right side
glowing blue rectangular light panels embedded in the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete tunnel at 20 seconds, leaving the rain behind. The environment shifts to an enclosed corridor illuminated by striking blue bioluminescent panels overhead. The car maintains high speed while navigating past slower vehicles in the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway canyon with towering corporate buildings and holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting tunnel into dense urban canyon with towering skyscrapers visible on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic in the neon-lit city canyon, passing corporate holograms

notable_agents.action: white delivery van traveling in the right lane, maintaining parallel position
yellow taxi ahead, slowing down in the center lane

entered.detail: tall futuristic corporate tower with illuminated windows rising on the left side
massive commercial building facade with glowing signage on the right
large floating digital billboard displaying animated neon advertisements
bright holographic display panel mounted on the building facade
illuminated corporate logo sign visible above the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel at 30 seconds, the scene opens into a dense urban canyon flanked by towering corporate skyscrapers. Holographic advertisements glow on both sides as the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic, including a white van and yellow taxi, while rain begins falling again.

scene_state.functional_zone: major highway intersection with lane markings and traffic control

events.description: vehicle decelerates from high speed to approximately 60 km/h approaching the intersection
approaching traffic control signals and intersection decision point with turn lane markings

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching the major intersection, following the yellow taxi through the junction

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi continuing straight through the intersection ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: painted turn arrows and lane dividers on the road surface indicating intersection approaches
suspended directional signage above the highway indicating routes
illuminated traffic lights and control signals at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows down approaching a major intersection marked with turn arrows and traffic control signals. The urban canyon opens up slightly, revealing more of the night sky as the car follows a yellow taxi through the junction, with speeds dropping to around 60 km/h.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from a rain-slicked highway through a neon tunnel and into a dense, holographic urban center. It begins on an elevated road at night, gliding past illuminated billboards and metal guardrails under the glow of artificial street lighting. As the vehicle enters a concrete tunnel, the rain vanishes and the environment shifts into an enclosed corridor defined by striking blue bioluminescent panels overhead. The scene then opens back into the rainy night as the car exits the tunnel into a corporate canyon flanked by towering skyscrapers and glowing holographic advertisements. Finally, the vehicle slows its pace while navigating through moderate traffic and following a yellow taxi through a wide intersection marked by traffic control signals.
